name: threejs-webgpu-skill-pack
description: Agent skill pack for Three.js WebGPU/TSL procedural graphics, image pipelines, and visual validation.

scripts.labs:check: node scripts/validate-lab-manifests.mjs && node scripts/check-lab-implementation-matrix.mjs && node scripts/check-lab-sources.mjs && node scripts/check-capture-wiring.mjs && node --test tests/labs/*.test.mjs && node scripts/run-labs.mjs check
scripts.pages:build: node scripts/build-pages.mjs && node scripts/generate-seo-images.mjs && node scripts/build-lab-pages.mjs && node scripts/validate-site-presentation.mjs && node scripts/validate-site-seo.mjs
scripts.pages:refresh-previews: node scripts/build-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-lab-pages.mjs && node scripts/capture-site-previews.mjs --primary-only && node scripts/build-pages.mjs && node scripts/generate-seo-images.mjs && node scripts/build-lab-pages.mjs && node scripts/validate-site-presentation.mjs && node scripts/validate-site-seo.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:skills && npm run labs:check
